name: SideB
description: Retro cassette-style player for TrimUI Brick with Spotify Connect, offline favorites, local MP3 playback, smart caching, and download progress
author: CharlexH

changelog.v1.0.9: Local MP3 import now scans nested folders under data/imports, so album subfolders are added to FAV LIST automatically.
changelog.v1.0.8: Added a status-bar battery indicator and SideB Lock screen-off behavior, with safer playback-aware sleep handling.
changelog.v1.0.7: Fixed NextUI Pak Store install layout so SideB launches from the menu after store installation.
changelog.v1.0.6: Major performance optimization: 3x faster rendering (87ms → 25ms per frame), eliminated CPU busy-waiting, fast alpha blending, reduced device temperature by ~25°C during playback.
changelog.v1.0.5: Smart multi-candidate YouTube search with duration scoring, post-download validation, real-time download progress in FAV LIST, and automatic resume of incomplete downloads on startup.
changelog.v1.0.4: Added ffmpeg-lite packaging, improved runtime logging, fixed Spotify takeover of local playback, and upgraded FAV LIST navigation with wrap-around and hold-to-repeat controls.
